claim_boundary: Under protocol ESA-S1-FLOOD-D201, the official ESA Sentinel-1 applications page supports the narrow claim that Sentinel-1 synthetic aperture radar is used for flood mapping and monitoring.
source_rights_note: ESA official public web page. No redistribution restrictions.
runner_command: uv run claimbound run-root --protocol-id ESA-S1-FLOOD-D201 --source-url https://www.esa.int/Applications/Observing_the_Earth/Sentinel-1/Flood_mapping --operator NeoZorK
known_limitations: Source boundary limited to ESA Sentinel-1 application page
Does not evaluate flood prediction accuracy
Does not assess coverage or response times in real incidents
Card records capability claims, not operational results
baseline_control_summary: Gate: Official ESA source page must explicitly name the mission/capability and confirm the narrow claim. Success means: (1) Source is accessible, (2) Source is from esa.int domain, (3) Relevant claim statement appears in source text, (4) No contradictions with claim boundary.
